channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: Iran reappoints a familiar face to powerful post during Khamenei funeral
item.description: The judiciary chief has emphasised the need to avenge Supreme Leader Ali Khamenei and prosecute foreign 'aggressors'.

item.title: Flavio Bolsonaro asks Trump to delay tariffs on Brazil until after election
item.description: President Lula accuses Jair Bolsonaro's son, now a presidential hopeful, of helping trigger proposed US tariffs.

item.title: Ticket prices continue to fall for USA-Belgium World Cup last 16 clash
item.description: Get-in prices for the round of 16 game at Seattle Stadium fall by 27 percent over the past three days.

item.title: Belgian football body challenges reversal of Balogun’s World Cup suspension
item.description: Trump says he asked FIFA's president to review USA player Balogun's game suspension, but did not tell him what to do.

item.title: What makes this NATO summit high stakes?
item.description: Al Jazeera’s James Bays explains why NATO’s Ankara summit is high stakes.

item.title: Balogun, Garrincha and Pinochet: FIFA’s controversial World Cup decisions
item.description: The Balogun affair has shocked football, but FIFA's showpiece has a long history of fixes, farces and failures.

item.title: Khamenei family mourns, but Mojtaba’s absence fuels public insecurity
item.description: Many Tehran residents say the absence of Iran's new supreme leader makes them question their own security.

item.title: UN rights body demands release of Palestinian doctor detained by Israel
item.description: Hussam Abu Safia's family and lawyer say his life is in imminent danger and shows signs of having been tortured.

item.title: Ex-Syrian intelligence chief in Raqqa convicted of torture in Austria
item.description: Khaled al-Halabi denied involvement, but the court deemed him responsible for abuse of detainees in Raqqa.

item.title: Argentina vs Egypt: FIFA World Cup last 16 – Messi, Salah, prediction, news
item.description: Lionel Messi's Argentina go up against Mohamed Salah's Egypt in a spicy World Cup round of 16 encounter.

item.title: Lebanon latest: Teacher killed by Israeli airstrike
item.description: Al Jazeera’s Heidi Pett brings you the latest from Lebanon, where Israeli strikes continue despite a ‘ceasefire’.

item.title: Portugal vs Spain LIVE: FIFA World Cup 2026 round of 16
item.description: Live coverage and text updates of the World Cup last-16 clash between Portugal and Spain in Dallas in the US.

item.title: Netanyahu says his ties with Trump are ‘fine’, takes aim at Turkiye
item.description: In Fox News interview, Israeli prime minister lauds US alliance and argues that Ankara should not receive F-35 jets.

item.title: UN discusses prevention of genocide: Six times it failed to do just that
item.description: The UN General Assembly meets amid Israel's genocide on Gaza, Myanmar's genocide against the Rohingya, and other crises.

item.title: US president Trump defends FIFA’s Balogun red card reversal
item.description: US President Donald Trump defended FIFA's decision to overturn Folarin Balogun's red card suspension.

item.title: Is NATO at breaking point as it meets in Turkiye?
item.description: NATO leaders gather in Ankara to tackle US-Europe tensions, defence gaps and support for Ukraine’s military resilience.

item.title: Israel’s Smotrich declares ‘revolution’ in West Bank settlement expansion
item.description: Smotrich declares a settlement 'revolution' as Israel approves 13 new outposts during big increase in settler violence.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Mohamed Salah and the ghosts of Egypt’s ‘golden generation’
item.description: Salah has previously taken flak from Egypt fans but now leads an undefeated team into the round of 16 to face Argentina.

item.title: Israeli attack on vehicle in Lebanon kills at least four
item.description: Israel continues to strike targets in southern Lebanon despite US-brokered ceasefire agreement.

item.title: The pitfalls of institutionalising US military aid to Israel
item.description: Shielding US commitments to Israel from congressional scrutiny would be harmful for both countries.

item.title: From Manchester to Downing Street: What Burnham could mean for Palantir
item.description: A 330 million pound NHS contract - and Palantir's wider role in UK government - hangs on Andy Burnham's next move.

item.title: Hamas announces dissolution of Gaza governing body
item.description: A Palestinian technocratic committee will take its place to manage the enclave's day-to-day governance.

item.title: England boss jokes Trump could help lift defender’s suspension
item.description: England boss jokes Trump could help lift defender’s suspension

item.title: Baby dies after Israeli troops block emergency journey to hospital
item.description: A baby died after his family’s attempt to reach hospital was blocked by Israel at a checkpoint in the occupied West Bank

item.title: Refugees killed in landslides at Rohingya camps in Bangladesh
item.description: Refugees killed in landslides at Rohingya camps in Bangladesh
